hero.title: Who is Leanmote for?
hero.subtitle: A holistic measurement system for every role in your engineering organization, from leadership strategy to day-to-day execution.

framework.title: The
framework.subtitle: Inspired by enterprise-wide change frameworks, Leanmote measures what matters at every layer.
framework.footnote: Adapted from McKinsey social sector impact framework.

layers.title: North Star Goal
items: Multiple of cost per PR and ACU cost across all PRs over a selected timeframe
Percent of reinvestment in greenfield and brownfield development

layers.title: Economic Outcomes
items: Time to revenue target through backlog acceleration
Dollar impact per new feature delivered by new teams
Per-team cost reduction from leaner delivery structures

layers.title: Inputs
items: Investment in AI coding and developer tooling
Time and budget invested in upskilling programs

personas.painHeadline: Justify every dollar of your AI and engineering investment.
personas.description: You need to prove ROI to leadership, not just present dashboards. Leanmote gives you economic language such as cost-per-impact-unit, throughput dividends, and reclaimed capacity to connect engineering work with business outcomes.
benefits: System-level ROI visibility across all teams
Cost-per-PR and ACU tracking for board reporting
Reinvestment signals for greenfield and brownfield work

personas.painHeadline: Stop spending 14 hours a week playing detective.
personas.description: Manual investigation, status syncs, and gut-feel prioritization drain your week. Leanmote highlights bottlenecks in real-time and helps route work so you can lead execution instead of chasing blockers.
benefits: Automated PR routing and smart task assignment

personas.painHeadline: Predict delivery timelines you can actually trust.
personas.description: Cross-team dependencies, hidden blockers, and optimistic estimates can derail roadmaps. Leanmote maps dependency context and improves sprint planning with real velocity and capacity signals.
benefits: Dependency mapping across teams and streams
Sprint intelligence grounded in actual velocity
Feature throughput predictions by system capacity

personas.description: Rework loops, review wait times, and context switching kill productivity. Leanmote reduces handoff friction with load-aware reviewer routing and smarter assignment based on flow state.
benefits: PR routing based on expertise and current load
Automated first-pass review and documentation support
Task assignment that respects flow and focus time
